remarks: Modern and Chic! Enjoy effortless, low-maintenance living in this beautifully updated 2-bedroom condominium at Fountain Terrace, a gated community in the heart of Stamford. Perched on the 9th floor with a private balcony, this bright and move-in-ready home offers an open, functional layout, abundant natural light, generous closet space, newer kitchen appliances including a dishwasher, and three included A/C units. Rent includes heat, hot water, cooking gas, water, trash removal, snow removal, landscaping, and one assigned parking space, providing exceptional value and predictable monthly expenses. Residents enjoy a wide range of amenities, including elevator access, a seasonal swimming pool, fitness center, community room, bicycle storage, private basement storage, card-operated laundry facilities, guest parking, and the security and convenience of a gated entrance. Ideally situated just minutes from downtown Stamford, the Metro-North station, restaurants, shopping, parks, and major commuter routes including I-95, this residence offers the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and accessibility. An excellent opportunity to enjoy a vibrant lifestyle in one of Stamford's most convenient locations.
